checklist.label: Release plan dry-run
checklist.evidence: 先生成包级 release plan、changelog 草稿和发布门禁记录，确认不会改写 package version。

checklist.label: TypeScript package contract
checklist.evidence: 所有 workspace package 必须通过 vue-tsc。

checklist.label: Unit and docs data tests
checklist.evidence: 组件行为、文档数据、live example 和资源页测试必须全部通过。

checklist.label: Package build artifacts
checklist.evidence: 发布前必须生成每个 package 的 dist、CSS 和声明文件。

checklist.label: Documentation production build
checklist.evidence: 官网路由、组件页和资源页需要通过 VitePress SSR 构建。

checklist.label: Runtime docs accessibility audit
checklist.evidence: 真实浏览器验收导航、页面结构、live example 锚点和响应式溢出。

artifacts.label: Markdown release plan
artifacts.description: 面向人工复核的包级发布计划、门禁命令和 changelog 草稿。

artifacts.label: Machine-readable release plan
artifacts.description: 面向自动化流程的 dry-run 结构化数据，可供后续 Changesets 或发布脚本接入。

changelogDraft.title: Yok UI 0.2.0 release candidate
changelogDraft.markdown:
# Yok UI 0.2.0 release candidate

Release gate evidence: API Live / Workflow Live / Source / Edited Source Share / Theme / A11y

## Stable promotions

## Required verification

- [ ] Release plan dry-run: `pnpm release:dry-run`
- [ ] TypeScript package contract: `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Unit and docs data tests: `pnpm test`
- [ ] Package build artifacts: `pnpm build`
- [ ] Documentation production build: `pnpm docs:build`
- [ ] Runtime docs accessibility audit: `DOCS_A11Y_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 pnpm docs:a11y:runtime`

versionHistory.title: Yok UI 0.2.0
versionHistory.summary: 57 components are grouped into 3 package release plans with shared readiness evidence.

versionHistory.title: Yok UI 0.1.0
versionHistory.summary: Initial multi-package workspace baseline with component docs, theme tokens, live examples and resource pages.
